hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"AUTO-REMINDER (project hook): 1) Ambiguous request, or the thing named does not match current code state -> STOP and ask the user before acting. 2) Before removing any column/feature -> Grep every occurrence of its name; after removing -> Grep again to confirm zero live references. 3) NEVER claim work is done based on intention - only on evidence. For code: read the changed section back and confirm it does what the user asked before saying done. If the user reports it does not appear in the app, do not repeat the same claim - investigate why (wrong location, second source, cache) with Grep/Read first. 4) Any pg28 table change -> re-verify the finalized styling spec in CLAUDE.md Lessons Learned still renders. 5) After committing -> push to BOTH the feature branch AND main, and only claim pushed after the push output or git log origin/main confirms the commit landed; a failed or rejected push must be reported as failed, never claimed as success."}}'
